meaning: n.上升,高地,正面图,海拔,提高,仰角,崇高,壮严
examples: The city is at an elevation of 2 000 metres.
We're probably at an elevation of about 13,000 feet above sea level.
As elevation increases, narrow, deep channels of water form throughout the marsh.
It leads down at first, but just past a small trout farm, the path begins to gain elevation.
His elevation to the cabinet will come as no surprise to people in Cardiff Bay.
